sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports pain in the inside of his right knee, describing it as sharp and intermittent. He reports pain in the left hand, stating it is a dull ache. The patient reports pain in the inside of their knee yesterday. The patient reports tenderness to palpation in the right knee. The patient denies any medication changes.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: The clinician observes tenderness to palpation in the right knee. The clinician notes normal sensation. Blood pressure is mildly low. Heart rate is within normal limits.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The clinician suspects a medial meniscus sprain and a knee injury. The patient sustained a knee injury yesterday.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: The doctor ordered the medications and procedures discussed. The doctor recommends giving motrin.
